    int n = landStartTime.size();
    int m = waterStartTime.size();

            long long land_end2 = land_start2 + landDuration[i];
            long long water_first = land_end2;
            
            long long current_min = min(land_first, water_first);
            if (current_min < min_time) {
                min_time = current_min;
            }
        }
    }
    return min_time;
}
